name: **[AlgoVerse – Data Structure Visualisation](https://github.com/Raqibreyaz/AlgoVerse)** | JavaScript
summary: A JavaScript visualization library supporting 5 core data structures (Graph, Heap, LinkedList, Stack, Queue).
highlights: Achieved **100+ npm downloads within 24 hours** of release, demonstrating strong developer adoption.

name: **[Synclet – Delta-based File Synchronization Tool](https://github.com/Raqibreyaz/Synclet)** | C++, Epoll, Inotify, TCP Sockets, Content-Defined Chunking
summary: An event-driven peer-to-peer file sync engine with delta synchronization and optimized network transfers.
highlights: Engineered **event-driven file monitoring system** using Linux **inotify** and **epoll** APIs for **non-blocking I/O**, eliminating CPU overhead from continuous polling
Implemented content-defined chunking with **Rabin-Karp** rolling hash algorithm and SHA-256 fingerprinting to enable **delta synchronization**, transmitting only modified file segments
Designed **bidirectional sync** protocol with snapshot versioning, binary-safe transfers, and **smart rename detection** using **timer-based event** correlation

name: **[ProxyRaQ – Multithreaded HTTP/HTTPS Proxy Server](https://github.com/Raqibreyaz/ProxyRaQ)** | C, TCP Sockets, Thread Pool, LRU Caching
summary: A high-performance HTTP/HTTPS proxy server built in pure C with caching, site blocking, and SSL/TLS support.
highlights: Developed a **multithreaded HTTP/HTTPS proxy server** in **pure C** with **caching**, **site blocking**, and **SSL/TLS**, featuring modular architecture.
Achieved **nearly 2,200 requests/sec throughput** under **1,000 concurrent clients**, maintaining **0% failures** and demonstrating high concurrency reliability.
Optimized **LRU caching** (in-memory + disk), socket backlog, and thread pool scheduling, ensuring **low-latency handling between(44–460 ms)** across varying loads.
Containerized with **Docker** for reproducible deployments and scalability testing.

name: **[Finance Manager – Personal Finance Tracking PWA](https://github.com/Raqibreyaz/Finance-Manager)** | Next.js, PostgreSQL, Drizzle ORM, React Query
summary: A full-stack progressive web app for tracking income, expenses, and savings with real-time analytics and multi-account support.
highlights: Built full-stack finance tracking PWA using Next.js frontend with PostgreSQL backend, implementing multi-account architecture with Drizzle ORM for type-safe database queries and relational data fetching

Optimized database queries using **Drizzle ORM's JOIN operations** and **Common Table Expressions (CTEs)** to efficiently aggregate transactions across **multiple accounts** and categories for analytics, replacing potential **N+1 query patterns**

Implemented end-to-end validation and type safety using Drizzle schema with Zod, enforcing **data consistency** across API endpoints and frontend forms with React Query for intelligent **client-side caching**

name: **[Banaras Mart – Full-Stack E-Commerce Platform](https://github.com/Raqibreyaz/Banaras-Mart)** | Node.js, React.js, Express.js, MongoDB, TailwindCSS
summary: A role-based multi-vendor e-commerce platform with secure JWT authentication, product management, and Razorpay payment integration.
highlights: Developed a **role-based multi-vendor e-commerce platform** with **secure JWT auth**, **product management**, and **Razorpay payments**, supporting **100+ products** and **3 user roles** (Admin/Seller/Customer).
Achieved **~45% faster page responses** and **>90% lower redundant API calls** using **modular Express.js controllers** and **Redux Toolkit Query caching**.
Ensured **100% transaction integrity** and **encrypted sessions** via **JWT + bcryptjs**; integrated **Cloudinary CDN** for **~5× faster image delivery** and responsive UX.

name: **[Mind Map Builder – Interactive Workflow Visualization Tool](https://github.com/Raqibreyaz/Mind-Map-Builder)** | React.js, React-Flow, Zustand
summary: An interactive flow-based editor enabling real-time node creation, connection, and manipulation with undo/redo support.
highlights: Built an **interactive flow-based editor** enabling users to create and connect **50+ nodes** with **real-time drag-and-drop** and **auto-connect edges** using **@xyflow/react**.
Optimized global state management with **Zustand's selector-based subscriptions**, reducing unnecessary component **re-renders by ~60%** and improving UI responsiveness.
Implemented **undo/redo stack** with efficient **snapshot tracking**, cutting **history memory usage by ~40%** and ensuring smooth actions under **high interaction frequency**.

name: **[CipherForge – File Encryption/Decryption Tool](https://github.com/Raqibreyaz/CipherForge)** | C++, Smart Pointers, Thread Pool
summary: A multi-threaded file encryption utility with optimized memory management and high performance.
highlights: Engineered a **multi-threaded file encryption utility** encrypting **1,000+ files** **4.2× faster** than sequential execution using **custom thread pool** and **load-balanced task distribution**.
Optimized memory management with **smart pointers** (unique_ptr, shared_ptr), eliminating memory leaks and maintaining **stability across 500+ concurrent operations**.
Achieved **\<10 MB peak memory usage** and ensured **100% successful encryption/decryption** of all files within **large directories (\>1 GB total data)**.
